sections.heading: Definition
sections.content: These are the letters we write to people who are very familiar to us.

sections.heading: Features
sections.content:
1. Writer’s Address and Date
2. Salutation
3. Introduction
4. Body of the letter
5. Subscript

sections.heading: Evaluation
sections.content: Write a letter to your friend who is in another school about your annual inter-house sports which you celebrated recently.
